messages.content:
[Product Release Video] Product Release Video:
We’re launching LearnFlow AI, an AI-powered tool that helps instructional designers automatically generate storyboards and training videos from text prompts. The product’s main features include instant scene generation, voiceover integration, and editable scripts. Key benefits: saves 80% of production time, maintains brand tone, and supports SCORM export.
Target audience: corporate learning teams, customer education professionals, and eLearning agencies.
Tone: modern, confident, and inspiring — focus on how LearnFlow AI transforms instructional design from a manual process into a creative, AI-assisted workflow.
Call to action: “Start your first storyboard for free.”
